headline: Broadcom Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Rise
summary: AVGO beats fiscal Q1 estimates as revenues jump 29.5% to $19.31B, fueled by 106% AI revenue growth; shares climb, and fiscal Q2 outlook points to surging AI demand.
